hooks.command: filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; case "$filepath" in *.js|*.jsx|*.ts|*.tsx|*.css|*.json|*.md) npx prettier --write "$filepath" 2>/dev/null ;; esac; exit 0
filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; case "$filepath" in */frontend/src/*) echo 'REMINDER: Frontend file edited. Verify UI manually or via preview tools before deploy.' ;; esac; exit 0

filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; case "$filepath" in */backend/src/controllers/*|*/backend/src/routes/*) echo 'REMINDER: Backend controller/route edited. Verify input validation, auth middleware, permission check, and corresponding test.' ;; esac; exit 0
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in */.env|*/.env.*) echo 'BLOCKED: .env files contain secrets and should not be edited by Claude. Ask the user to edit manually.' >&2; exit 1 ;; esac; exit 0
case "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" in *'git push'*|*'git commit'*) echo 'BLOCKED: Git commit/push should be done by the SRE agent or a human.' >&2; exit 1 ;; esac; exit 0
